tasks.title: Review Export Visibility
tasks.description: Review whether `pub(crate)` visibility should be changed to `pub` for external crate access. Current: `pub(crate) use id::{IdGenerator, IdParseError, ProjectId, SessionId, UserId};`. Potential change: `pub use id::{IdGenerator, IdParseError, ProjectId, SessionId, UserId};`
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify external crates can access Id types when visibility is pub
AddIntegrationTest: verify opencode-core exports are available to downstream crates
AddRegressionTest: ensure no compilation errors in dependent crates after visibility change
tasks.impl_notes: Decision criteria: If opencode-core types need to be accessed by external crates → change to pub. If types are intentionally internal → keep pub(crate). Low priority - internal usage works fine.

tasks.title: Consider Adding Ord/PartialOrd Derives
tasks.description: Consider adding `derive(Ord, PartialOrd)` to `define_id_newtype!` macro if total ordering of IDs is required. Current derives: `#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]`. Potential change: `#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Ord, PartialOrd)]`
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Id types can be compared using Ord/PartialOrd
AddUnitTest: verify IDs can be sorted in BTreeMap/BTreeSet without custom comparator
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing tests (18/18) still pass after adding derives
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify ordering is consistent with UUID ordering
tasks.impl_notes: Decision criteria: If IDs need to be sorted (e.g., in BTreeMap without custom comparator) → add derives. Current workaround: `id1.0.cmp(&id2.0)` works without derives. No functional impact - low priority.
